metadata.title: Dua & Ruqyah — SEO Optimization
metadata.description: Targeted SEO strategy for Dua & Ruqyah, improving Islamic content discoverability and driving higher organic engagement.

title: Dua & Ruqyah
content: Delivered a results-driven SEO campaign for Dua & Ruqyah. Conducted deep-dive keyword mapping for Islamic content niches, performed competitor gap analysis, and implemented structured data markup. The project achieved improved SERP positions across key topic clusters and boosted click-through rates significantly.
